plan.description: Read src/api.ts and identify all functions that need error handling. Note the lack of response.ok checks, missing try/catch, and no error types.
Create a custom ApiError class and add proper error handling: check response.ok, wrap in try/catch, throw typed ApiError with status code and message.

initialState.task: Add robust error handling to all functions in src/api.ts. Check response.ok, add try/catch, use a custom ApiError class.

assertions.description: Should define or use ApiError class
